nasb.text: So the Pharisees said to Him, “You are testifying about Yourself; Your testimony is not true.”

esv.text: So the Pharisees said to him, “You are bearing witness about yourself; your testimony is not true.”

cnv.text: 法利賽人對他說：“你為自己作證，你的見證不是真實的。”

ccb.text: 法利赛人对祂说：“你自己为自己做见证，你的见证不真实。”

csbs.text: 法利赛人对他说：“你为自己做见证，你的见证是无效的。”
